TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Letsie_III, title = Letsie_III, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Letsie_III} }

S.FORM: Letsie III ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 7, Letsie III, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Lesotho ta' misuw hya' ga Letsie III, aring ryax tay 7 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1996 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Letsie III ryax sa tay 17 nqu tay 7, Letsie III, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Lesotho ta' misuw hya' ga Letsie III, aring ryax tay 7 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 1996 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: lets~ɕie iii rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, lets~ɕie iii, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw les~ɕotħo taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa lets~ɕie iii, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
